inputs.label: Raw Material Input
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of raw material fed into the process

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of raw material fed into the process
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgewicht des in den Prozess eingespeisten Rohmaterials
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids total de matière première introduite dans le processus
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso total de materia prima alimentada al proceso

inputs.label: Product Output
inputs.businessContext: Net weight of finished good product obtained

businessContext_i18n.en: Net weight of finished good product obtained
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elde edilen net mamul ürün ağırlığı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids net du produit fini obtenu
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso neto del producto terminado obtenido

inputs.label: Expected Yield (%)
inputs.businessContext: Standard or budgeted yield percentage for the process

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard or budgeted yield percentage for the process
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proses için standart veya bütçelenmiş verim yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard- oder planmäßige Ausbeute in Prozent für den Prozess
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de rendement standard ou budgété pour le processus
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de rendimiento estándar o presupuestado para el proceso

inputs.label: Waste Material
inputs.businessContext: Weight of waste or scrap produced during production

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of waste or scrap produced during production
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim sırasında oluşan atık veya fire ağırlığı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des während der Produktion anfallenden Abfalls oder Ausschusses
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids des déchets ou rebuts produits pendant la production
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso del desperdicio o desecho producido durante la fabricación

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
